title: 潘马斯农场2: 简体中文汉化包
description:
内含潘马斯农场2食物核心，食物扩展，作物，果树，奇幻的翻译

Contains Chinese translations of Pam's HarvestCraft 2 Food Core, Food Expansion, Crops, Fruit Trees, and Fantasy
body:
这个翻译包括潘马斯农场2的[食物核心](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-food-core)，[食物扩展](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-food-extended)，[作物](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops)，[果树](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-trees)，[奇幻](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-fantasy)


[错误报告issue](https://github.com/Muruaaki/pamhc2zhcn/issues)
